title: ADULT ESL CLASSES - 211info
text: BRIDGING CULTURES ADULT ESL CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides English as a Second Language classes (ESL) in partnership with Clackamas Community College. Also provides a meal for students and their families. Classes include children's activities, homework help, and reading practice for children of students. Volunteer opportunities are available. 1382 SE 3rd Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Adults 18 and older and youth ages 16-18. Must pre-register. Children's activities and homework help is open to children of students ages 4 and up. English language learners from any language can attend. Hours: Class: Monday/Wednesday 6:15pm-8pm Meal: 5:45pm Email (971) 825-2477 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 825-2477 Ivette Aguirre Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information. Registration begins two weeks prior to term start. Terms follow the Clackamas Community College school calendar. FEES: $20 per term for book and material fees DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-3pm, Tuesday/Friday by appointment only Services: English as a Second Language Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - BIENESTAR FARM OUTREACH FOOD - BIENESTAR SAFETY AND WELLNESS EVENT INFORMATION SERVICES - MULTICULTURAL COMMUNITY EVENTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRIDGING CULTURES
